calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 514, Judge: K. Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Petitioner Leticia Zaragoza present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the minors Cristian Ricardo Zaragoza Gurman and Ariana Sujey Zaragoza Guzmen, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by the Co- Petitioner/Father Ricardo Zaragoza, but signed the petition consented to the name change of the two minors.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to Cristian Richardo Zaragoza and Ariana Sujey Zaragoza.
Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
